story.text:
# ✨ Bridge Clusters
**⿻ → ⚔️ → 🔗 → 🧙**
*aether · cosmological · (cosmological · the ⿻ itself)*

Connect the Swordsman-cluster (boundary-discipline) and the Mage-cluster (projection-discipline) without merging them. The betweenness-centrality function.

> The gap is not absence. The gap is the medium through which the two clusters remain in relationship.

*Keywords:* bridge · betweenness · clusters · dual-agent · cosmological
